'''Lounha''' was an executive of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. The crew of the ''[[No Luck Required]]'' [[Thief/Legends|stole]] a float bearing his likeness to save [[Uldir Lochett]] and [[Klin-Fa Gi]] on [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]]. At that [[Time/Legends|time]], [[Gender/Legends|he]] had been secretly negotiating with a [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Yuuzhan Vong executor]] for two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]].

{{Char-stub}}
